notes:
v0.6.37: changelog modal + post-update popup, maximize button, polished auth screen

What's new in Settings -> Software shows the last 30 releases pulled from GitHub. A one-shot popup also appears the first time you launch after auto-update so you see what changed. Added a maximize button to the title bar (also added a full minimize/maximize/close bar to the auth screen, which previously had no chrome). Fixed a logout bug that left your email + masked password pre-filled in the form. Auth screen now slides + fades in with staggered field animations, focus ring on inputs, and hover/press feedback on the submit button.
